Contracting Authority: Investitions- und Förderbank Niedersachsen – NBank, Günther-Wagner-Allee 12–16, 30177 Hannover (AöR)
Project Description:
- Public tender (UVgO) RE 2024.33
- Advisory support to: improve project portfolio steering/planning and implement PM/PPM optimizations
- Internal project: „PM-Weiterentwicklung“ (01.07.2024–30.09.2025)
- Context: PM standard per IPMA ICB 4.0; PM tool Blue Ant (since 2021)
- Targets: MaRisk- and PM-related DORA-conform PM for IKT projects; stronger PPM control function; program management; PM handbook
Important Dates:
- Planned award/binding period end: 30.08.2024
- Planned service start: 04.09.2024
- Portfolio 2025 fix date: 15.10.2024 (must be met)
- Optimization measures finalized: 31.01.2025
- DORA minimum requirements effective: 17.01.2025
- Project end (internal): 30.09.2025

Scope & Requirements.Scope & Requirements:
- Not divided into lots; single contractor
- Improve portfolio steering/planning (by 15.10.2024):
  • Shift resource mgmt to skill/task basis
  • Transparency CTB/RTB resource shares
  • Skill-/task-based resource demand per project
  • Method for matching resource supply/demand
  • Benchmark resources vs other Förderbanken
  • Portfolio-level feasibility check
  • Portfolio dependency mgmt (project radar)
  • Binding planning/prioritization rules
  • Support creation of a “feasible” 2025 portfolio
- Optimize PM/PPM:
  • Reporting: optimized, unified; KPIs incl. process anchoring
  • Quality criteria (pre-checks, quality gates)
  • Project radar/dependency mgmt
  • Risk analysis optimization
  • Revise PM processes per IPMA; consider DORA for IT demand/change mgmt of IKT projects
  • Special rules for “wesentliche/IKT/critical or important functions” projects
  • Governance and committees (project/portfolio/program) clarity
  • Introduce program management (governance, process, reporting)
  • Create PM handbook
- Compliance scope: PM-related MaRisk; PM-related DORA (formal MaRisk/DORA QA not in scope)
Scope & Requirements.Contract Volume:
- 6 months base term; max total 14 months
- Minimum: 65 BT in first 6 months (≈ 55 BT in 2024; 10 BT in 2025)
- Maximum: 140 BT
- 1 BT = 8 h
- Ensure required BT in Sep–Oct 2024 to meet 15.10.2024 portfolio date
Scope & Requirements.Place of Performance:
- NBank, Günther-Wagner-Allee 12–16, 30177 Hannover
- Presence ≈ 60%; remote ≈ 40% (variance by agreement)
Scope & Requirements.Standards & Certifications:
- IPMA ICB 4.0 (PM standard)
- MaRisk (PM-related for IT projects)
- DORA (Verordnung (EU) 2022/2554) PM-related reqs; ensure conformity from 17.01.2025
- Contract conditions: VOL/B
- Data protection: BDSG/DSGVO; bank secrecy
Scope & Requirements.Subcontracting & Consortia:
- No Arbeitnehmerüberlassung; freelance advisory services
- Subcontractors only with prior written consent of NBank
- If using partners: name partners; indicate subcontracted parts; each partner provides required declarations
- Joint bids: name lead representative; joint and several liability (§ 421 BGB)
Scope & Requirements.Forms & e-Submission:
- e-Submission and all communication exclusively via Deutsches Vergabeportal (www.dtvp.de)
- Offer language: German; no variants; no AGB; no changes to tender docs
- Mark trade secrets clearly
- Submit: Price sheet (Anlage 02a), Self-declarations (Anlage 03/05), Data protection undertaking (Anlage 04), References (Anlage 06), Concept (≤ 3 pages)

Offer Submission Documents: Completed price sheet Anlage 02a (hourly rates; 1 BT = 8 h; incl. all incidentals)
Concept (≤ 3 pages) incl. phases, timeline (6 months), BT estimates (2.2.1/2.2.2), methods, staffing; consider 15.10.2024
Named staff (Senior/Consultant) with qualifications and CVs
Self-declaration exclusion grounds (EEA § 50 VgV or Anlage 03) or PQ no.
Company information (name, legal form, address, contact, brief org/service profile)
Contact person + deputy; availability Mo–Fr 9:00–17:00; response time ≤ 4 h on working days
List of Documents: Entry in trade/professional register (proof or self-declaration)
Evidence of business liability insurance (exists and will persist for contract term)
Statement of parts to be subcontracted (if applicable)
Consortium declaration incl. distribution of services and joint/several liability (§ 421 BGB)
Reference details: client name, contact person, phone, performance period (last 3 years)

Legal & Registration.Trade/Professional Register Entry: - Proof of entry in a professional or trade register (or equivalent self-declaration)
Legal & Registration.Self-declarations (GWB §§123/124 or equi: - EEA § 50 VgV or Anlage 03; confirm no grounds per §§123/124 GWB
Legal & Registration.Subcontractor Identification & Reliance: - Name all partners/subcontractors; state subcontracted parts; each partner submits own proofs

Technical & Professional Ability.Personnel Profiles:
- Roles:
  • Senior-Berater: ≥ 5 years consulting experience at senior level
  • Consultant: ≥ 2 years experience at consultant level
- Skills (both):
  • Project & program management (ideally IPMA)
  • Multi-project / portfolio management
  • Project resource planning & control
  • KPIs and quality gates
  • Method competence incl. tool usage (e.g., Blue Ant)
  • Teamwork; active/open communication
- Sector: consulting experience in Förderbanken and comparable companies
- Substitution: rapid replacement with equally qualified profile; client decides equivalence
- Proof: CVs
Technical & Professional Ability.Headcount / Staffing:
- Ensure capacity for ≥ 65 BT in base 6 months; secure BT in Sep–Oct 2024
- Presence ≈ 60% onsite / 40% remote
- Named contact + deputy reachable Mo–Fr 9:00–17:00; response ≤ 4 h
Technical & Professional Ability.Reference Projects:
- Key-person proof via CVs
- Company references submitted separately (see Company Referrals)

Company Referrals:
- Bidder references: min 3, max 5 comparable services within last 3 years
- Provide: client (named), contact person + phone, performance period, scope (Anlage 06)
- References from private or Landesbanken accepted as equivalent to Förderbanken if comparable in scope
Award Criteria:
- Most economically advantageous tender (MEAT)
- Total weighting: 100%
- 1. Price (30%, max 90 points):
  • 1a Average hourly rate incl. all incidentals (15%, max 3 pts; Position 1 in price sheet). Scoring: (lowest price / evaluated price) × 3
  • 1b Total evaluation price for base term (15%, max 3 pts; Position 3). Formula: (Senior €/h × 8 × required Senior BT) + (Consultant €/h × 8 × required Consultant BT), incl. all incidentals. Scoring: (lowest / evaluated) × 3
- 2. Concept (70%, max 210 points; 0–3 pts scale):
  • 3=very good; 2=good; 1=sufficient; 0=insufficient (clarity of approach, expected performance, timeline, staffing, methods)
